profile_extractor_configs.extraction_definition_prompt: Extract key user information: name, location, occupation, preferences, constraints, family details, technical setup, communication preferences, or any personal facts.
profile_extractor_configs.context_prompt: Multi-user conversation between customers and a support agent.

user_playbook_extractor_configs.extraction_definition_prompt: Identify agent mistakes, missed tools, incorrect info, or user-specific instructions about preferred response format, tone, style, or detail level. Focus on actionable corrections.
